Pilot program providing five fare-free bus routes in New York City
Fare Free Bus Pilot with routes selected based on criteria, beginning September 24, 2023.

2023 New York State budget mandated the MTA select and operate one bus route in each borough to be fare free for 6-12 months. Routes: B60 (Brooklyn), Bx18A/B (Bronx), M116 (Manhattan), Q4 (Queens), S46/S96 (Staten Island). Pilot began September 24, 2023. Fare collection resumes on September 1, 2024.
Based on 2023 NYS budget mandating one fare-free bus route per borough for 6-12 months. Results from first 9 months discussed by Jon Kaufman and Chris Pangilinan.
